title: Assistant Director, Development Office
description:
Responsibilities:

  • To effectively manage key Development processes (of Identification, Engagement, Solicitation and Stewardship of Donations) and coordinate the engagement, solicitation and stewardship efforts of internal and external stakeholders so as to advance philanthropic intent and goals
  • Assist the organisation to build interest/corporate ownership of philanthropy with clinicians, administrators and connectors on their roles in staff giving as well as attracting donor funds with identified causes for major gifts
  • Draft and vet proposals by working with clinicians and administrators to build compelling causes to prospective donors
  • To oversee and supervise the proper receipting of donations, processes and donor management records/databases, in the interest of governance



Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in business management, science, arts and social sciences and/or other relevant disciplines
  • Degree with at least 10 years related/relevant experience and at least 5 years of managerial/supervisory experience.
  • Preferably in philanthropy work, event management and marketing communications will be appreciated
  • Excellent written communication skills with strong analytical and good assessment acumen & capabilities
  • Well-versed knowledge of Excel, with a good working knowledge of pivot tables and some experience in information analytics will be advantageous.
  • Familiarity with design software (ie. Canva, Capcut) and keen interest in new media modes of interface will be advantageous
  • Meticulous, ability to multi-task and plan effectively
  • Self-motivated team player with high integrity and able to work under pressure and tight timelines

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified

postedCompany.description:
Changi General Hospital (CGH) is a trusted healthcare provider with over 1000 beds in eastern Singapore.  We provide a comprehensive range of medical specialties. CGH offers the entire gamut of medical services, from general surgery, internal medicine,  cardiology, ENT to orthopaedic surgery and dermatology. Our peaks of medical excellence are represented by the Integrated Sleep Service, Breast Centre @ changi, Endoscopy Centre, Diabetes Centre, Geriatric Centre and the Changi Sports Medicine Centre.  Changi Sports Medicine Centre is Singapore’s largest and is a leading provider of sports medicine expertise.

CGH is dedicated to improving the health of the community in the east and to provide excellence and compassion in service and care.  To improve care for patients, it has adopted a proactive integrated care approach.  Partnering with healthcare providers in the east, it is bringing disease management programmes and disease prevention programmes to patients’ doorstep.
postedCompany.name: CHANGI GENERAL HOSPITAL PTE LTD
